title: Nearly half of colorectal cancer diagnoses are now in people younger than 65
description: As younger generations age, researchers are warning that their colorectal cancer burden will “swell like a tsunami.”
content:
The face of colorectal cancer is getting younger by the day. Meanwhile, researchers are potentially years away from understanding why.
Just weeks after actor James Van Der Beek died of colorectal ca… [+4946 chars]
de: Fast die Hälfte der Darmkrebsdiagnosen betrifft mittlerweile Menschen unter 65 Jahren. Mit zunehmendem Alter jüngerer Generationen warnen Forscher, dass ihre Darmkrebsbelastung „wie ein Tsunami ansteigen“ wird.
en: Nearly half of colorectal cancer diagnoses are now in people younger than 65. As younger generations age, researchers are warning that their colorectal cancer burden will “swell like a tsunami.”
la: Prope dimidium diagnoses cancri colorectales nunc sunt in iunioribus quam 65. Cum aetates minores, investigatores monent eorum cancrum colorectale onus "sicut tsunami tument."
